positive: A stylized, highly detailed celestial forest scene. The composition features bioluminescent flora, ancient, geometrically carved trees with visible roots, and graceful, stylized constellations forming archways. The overall aesthetic should be a mix of Art Nouveau elegance and sacred geometry, rendered as a crisp, high-contrast silhouette illustration. Use a color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, ethereal mint greens, and radiant golds, with clear lines and minimal gradient wash. The foreground should have a strong central focus of a meandering glowing river that reflects the starry canopy. Suitable for a clean, repeat pattern or single center print on fabric. Ink wash effect meets intricate line art. Cinematic lighting, centralized composition.
negative: blur, grain, noisy, low contrast, text, watermark, signature, logo, graffiti, jpeg artifacts, muddy colors, photorealism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, ugly, messy lines
